creator: pfcovello@gmail.com
text:
I would like to chime in since this ticket has been around a while...

I too have problems remembering the sysrc utility (short term memory is always the first to go).  Being able to search the relevant rc man pages would give me the answer if it was mentioned in the "see also" section.

So I want to give a +1 vote for this as well.  Bonus if this could be mentioned in the handbook as well!

Thank you!
